description: You are a molecular biologist studying hemoglobin evolution. Your goal is to compare the human (P68871) and chicken (P02112) hemoglobin beta subunit protein sequences found in ~/UGENE_Data/hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta. Extract the human and chicken sequences into separate FASTA files named 'human_hbb.fasta' and 'chicken_hbb.fasta' in ~/UGENE_Data/results/. Perform a Smith-Waterman pairwise local alignment between these sequences using the BLOSUM62 matrix and save the result to ~/UGENE_Data/results/sw_alignment.aln. Generate a dotplot comparing the two sequences and export it to ~/UGENE_Data/results/dotplot.png. Finally, produce a comparison report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/comparison_report.txt that includes the sequence lengths, alignment score, percent identity, number of gaps, and a brief interpretation of the dotplot.
